final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a bubble tea product, targeting Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) lifestyle platform.

Style/medium: lifestyle product photography, soft pastel aesthetic, influencer-style content shot
Composition: centered flat-lay or 45-degree angle, shallow depth of field, product as hero
Subject: pearl milk tea (boba tea) in a clear cup showing tapioca pearls, condensation droplets on cup surface
Scene/backdrop: clean minimal surface with soft pink props (flowers, macarons, or stationery), airy negative space
Lighting/mood: bright natural daylight, soft diffused window light, fresh and breezy summer atmosphere
Color palette: soft pink dominant with cream white and pearl beige accents, warm brown tea tones
Materials/textures: glossy plastic cup, chewy tapioca pearls visible through liquid, water condensation beads
Text (verbatim): "小红书种草封面"
Avoid: dark moody lighting, cluttered composition, artificial studio flash, generic stock photo aesthetic
